decks.notes: This Goblin Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost Goblin creatures and using the synergy between cards like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Warchief to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. The deck also includes removal options like Gempalm Incinerator and Mogg Fanatic to handle threats from the opponent. With strong utility cards like Goblin Matron and Siege-Gang Commander, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. Land disruption through Wasteland and Rishadan Port helps to control the pace of the game.

The deck focuses on using Stasis to lock down the opponent's resources and prevent them from untapping their permanents, while using various card draw and counterspell effects to maintain control of the game. The goal is to establish a Stasis lock and then overwhelm the opponent with card advantage and disruptive spells until they run out of options. The deck also includes a few win conditions such as Black Vise and Upheaval to seal the game once the opponent is completely locked down.

The main focus of this deck is to create a combo with the en-Kor creatures and Daru Spiritualist, allowing for an infinite life gain loop. This combo relies on using cards like Worthy Cause and Transmutation to sacrifice creatures and trigger the loop. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures that can be searched for using Eladamri's Call and Living Wish to adapt to different board states. The mana base is designed to support the combo and ensure consistency in executing the game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with efficient creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Anurid Brushhopper, while disrupting the opponent's mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. Terravore serves as a versatile threat that can quickly become a massive creature. Weathered Wayfarer helps fix mana and find important lands like Rishadan Port. The deck can also generate card advantage with Sylvan Library and token generation with Call of the Herd. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and land destruction tactics.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize powerful combo pieces such as Brain Freeze and Ill-Gotten Gains to quickly mill your opponent's library and win the game. The deck focuses on generating mana with cards like Cabal Ritual and Lion's Eye Diamond, while also digging through your deck for key pieces with cards like Intuition and Sleight of Hand. The inclusion of Cephalid Coliseum and Flash of Insight provide additional ways to draw cards and manipulate your library. Overall, the strategy revolves around assembling the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to close out the game.

This Enchantress combo deck focuses on utilizing various enchantments to generate card advantage and mana efficiency. The key strategy revolves around playing multiple Enchantress creatures, utilizing cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile to draw cards, and ramping up mana quickly with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The deck also includes Parallax Wave and Opalescence as key combo pieces to control the board and generate lethal threats. With efficient card draw and mana ramp, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful enchantments and win the game.

This deck focuses on assembling key combo pieces quickly to win the game. Using cards like Survival of the Fittest and Hermit Druid, the deck aims to fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Phyrexian Devourer and Psychatog. Once the combo pieces are in place, the deck can use cards like Krosan Reclamation and Unearth to bring back key creatures and finish the opponent off with a powerful attack. The deck also includes disruption elements like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly generating mana with elves and utilizing creatures with powerful abilities to overwhelm the opponent. The main goal is to ramp up quickly with mana dorks like Fyndhorn Elves and Llanowar Elves, while utilizing cards like Priest of Titania and Gaea's Cradle to produce massive amounts of mana. The deck also includes key utility cards like Wirewood Symbiote and Quirion Ranger to provide additional flexibility and protection. Ultimately, the deck aims to flood the board with creatures and leverage its mana advantage to close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on ramping up quickly through efficient enchantments like Wild Growth and Enchantress's Presence, while using powerful combo pieces like Opalescence and Replenish to overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to control the board with enchantments like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing, while setting up a win condition with cards like Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement. The goal is to outpace the opponent with card draw and mana acceleration, ultimately overwhelming them with a powerful enchantment-based combo.

The deck focuses on using enchantresses to draw cards whenever enchantments are played, while also utilizing a variety of enchantments to create a powerful combo. The deck aims to ramp up mana using cards like Wild Growth and Exploration, while protecting itself with cards like Seal of Cleansing and Sterling Grove. The win condition is to use Replenish to bring back multiple enchantments from the graveyard, combined with Opalescence to turn all enchantments into creatures and overwhelm the opponent. It also includes control elements with cards like Parallax Wave and Solitary Confinement.

The deck focuses on using creature abilities and card advantage to control the game while utilizing Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures. With a strong mana base, access to powerful creatures like Deranged Hermit and Skyshroud Poacher, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and generate incremental advantages over time. Additionally, the deck includes disruption elements like Thornscape Battlemage and Orcish Settlers to disrupt opposing strategies. This archetype excels at grinding out games and overwhelming opponents with a combination of efficient creatures and synergistic card interactions.

The core idea of this deck is to use cards like Meddling Mage, Stifle, and Counterspell to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up a combo with Phyrexian Dreadnought to quickly win the game. This deck aims to control the game with counterspells and disruptive spells while drawing cards and manipulating the opponent's library with Vision Charm and Portent. By efficiently stalling the opponent and assembling the combo pieces, this deck can quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory in the early game.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with cards like Attunement and use Replenish to bring back powerful enchantments like Saproling Burst and Parallax Wave. By combining Opalescence and Pandemonium, the deck can create a win condition by turning enchantments into creatures and dealing significant damage to the opponent. The deck also includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Arcane Denial to protect the combo pieces. The goal is to set up the combo quickly and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence.

The deck utilizes a combination of cards to set up a powerful combo involving Replenish. It uses cards like Frantic Search and Intuition to dig for key pieces, while also including disruption like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares. The main win condition is to utilize Replenish to bring back powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, creating a strong board presence that is difficult for opponents to deal with. Tsabo's Web and Seal of Cleansing provide additional utility and disruption, while the manabase is designed to support the combo and ensure smooth gameplay.

The deck focuses on quickly building and maintaining a board presence while dealing direct damage to the opponent. It includes aggressive creatures with low mana cost and powerful burn spells to control the board and finish off the opponent quickly. The strategy involves using efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup to apply early pressure, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to deal direct damage and finish off the opponent. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle.
